name: Personal Finance TV
descriptions: Finance. Uncomplicated. Struggling to make sense of your money? You're not alone & you're in the right place. Welcome to ...
email_msg:
Hi Personal Finance TV,

I recently watched your video titled "Personal Finance TV" and really liked how you explain finance in a simple and practical way.

We are building fintech app for saving and investing in India, focused on helping users improve their saving and investing habits.

We believe a collaboration with you would strongly resonate with your audience and add real value.

Would love to explore this together!

Best,
Team
dm_msg: Hi Personal Finance TV! Loved your video on "Personal Finance TV". Would love to collaborate on finance-related content.
